events.empty_subtitle: Be the first to create an event!
events.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this event? All participants will be notified.

form.title: Event title
form.click_map_hint: Click on the map to set location
form.max_participants_hint: Leave empty if there's no limit

events.landing_meta: Organize and discover community events with built-in encrypted chat. In-person, online or hybrid. Free and open-source.
events.landing_hero_title: Community events — organize and join for free
events.landing_hero_subtitle: From neighborhood meetups to assemblies. Create events, gather participants and communicate via automatic encrypted chat.
events.landing_problem_1: Events scattered across Facebook, WhatsApp and Instagram — impossible to find everything
events.landing_problem_2: No dedicated chat for coordination between participants
events.landing_problem_3: Event platforms that charge fees and track users
events.landing_feature_1_desc: In-person, online (Jitsi/Zoom) or hybrid events — all on one platform
events.landing_feature_2_desc: Each event auto-creates an encrypted Matrix room. Participants join when they RSVP
events.landing_feature_3_desc: RSVP with 'Going' or 'Maybe', participant limits, notifications and simple organization
events.landing_feature_4_desc: In-person events appear on the map. Search by location, date or category
events.landing_feature_5_desc: Only verified users (WoT 2+) can create events — no spam, no fake events
events.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no fees, no ads. Civic infrastructure, not a product
events.landing_how_1: Create an event — in-person, online or hybrid
events.landing_how_2: Share with the community — participants RSVP and join the chat
events.landing_how_3: Coordinate via encrypted chat before, during and after the event
events.landing_free_desc: Organizing community should not cost money. Parahub is free and open civic infrastructure.
